explanations.5: utf8_decode converts text from UTF-8 to a single-byte format, but "Ipso lorem" is already plain text, so this doesn't help; json_decode will fail silently and return null because the string isn't valid JSON.
explanations.9: The JSON_THROW_ON_ERROR flag makes json_decode throw an exception instead of returning null when it encounters invalid JSON, so you'll see the error instead of silent failure.
